title: Aluminium Kitchen Foil Roll 2 Pack 30cm x 12M Cooking Foil Tin Foil Catering Foil Food Wrap Foil for Baking Grilling Roasting BBQ Storage Restrurant Style
features: Premium Quality Material – Made from strong aluminium, this kitchen foil offers excellent durability, tear resistance, and flexibility, making it perfect for both home and professional catering use.
Value Pack Size – Supplied in a convenient 2 pack, each roll measures 30cm wide and 12M long, giving you a total of 24M aluminium foil for everyday cooking, wrapping, and food storage needs.

Versatile Everyday Uses – Commonly called kitchen foil, tin foil, cooking foil, or catering foil, it is ideal for wrapping food, lining baking trays, grilling meat, roasting vegetables, keeping food fresh, and storing leftovers.

Keeps Food Hot and Fresh – With excellent heat retention and freshness sealing, this aluminium foil keeps your meals warm for longer while locking in flavour and preventing odours from spreading in the fridge or freezer.
Easy to Use and Reliable – Designed for hassle-free cutting, storage, and use in any kitchen. Suitable for home cooks, restaurants, takeaways, and BBQ enthusiasts.
